cves.description: Log4Shell: JNDI injection in Apache Log4j2 versions 2.0-beta9 through 2.14.1. Attacker-controlled log messages trigger outbound LDAP connections and RCE.
Spring4Shell: Spring Framework RCE via DataBinder and class property access in Spring MVC apps deployed to Tomcat. Affects Spring Framework < 5.3.18.
Jackson Databind deserialization in versions < 2.9.10. Default typing enablement allows arbitrary code execution via crafted input.

threat_actors.description: North Korean state-sponsored APT. Targets financial institutions and cryptocurrency exchanges. Known to weaponise Log4Shell for initial access in fintech and banking environments.
Financially motivated cybercriminal group. Targets payment processing systems, POS infrastructure, and financial APIs. Has exploited Spring4Shell in targeted campaigns.
Chinese state-sponsored group with dual espionage and financial crime mandate. Targets fintech companies for IP theft and payment data.
